title: Andmeanalüüs dashboard
description_et: Interaktiivne dashboard Pythoni andmete visualiseerimiseks. Filtrid, graafikud ja eksport.
description_en: Interactive dashboard for Python data visualization. Filters, charts and export.

title: Portfoolio v1
description_et: Esimene portfoolio leht — HTML, CSS ja vanilla JS. Responsive disain.

title: Ilmarakendus
description_et: OpenWeather API kasutamine Reactis. Otsing, ikoonid, 5-päeva prognoos.
description_en: Weather app using OpenWeather API in React. Search, icons, 5-day forecast.
